turns.content: Install the Grafana operator from OperatorHub in namespace grafana, create a Grafana instance, and configure a datasource pointing to the OpenShift built-in Prometheus at https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091

I'll automate the following tasks:

1. Installation of the Grafana operator from OperatorHub in the `grafana` namespace.
2. Creation of a Grafana instance.
3. Configuration of a datasource for the Grafana instance, pointing to the OpenShift built-in Prometheus at `https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091`.

Here's the Ansible playbook I'll generate:

```yaml
---
- name: Install and configure Grafana operator
  hosts: localhost

  tasks:
  - name: Create namespace if it does not exist
    oc_rbac:
      api: v1
      kind: Namespace
      metadata:
        name: grafana
      state: present

  - name: Create service account for Grafana operator
    oc_rbac:
      api: v1
      kind: ServiceAccount
      metadata:
        name: grafana-operator-sa
        namespace: grafana
      state: present

  - name: Bind service account to role
    oc_rbac:
      api: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
      kind: RoleBinding
      metadata:
        name: grafana-operator-rb
      role_ref:
        api_group: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
        kind: ClusterRole
        name: system:deployer
      subjects:
        - api_group: ""
          kind: ServiceAccount
          name: grafana-operator-sa

  - name: Install Grafana operator from OperatorHub
    helm_release:
      repo_url: https:// Operators Community Chart Repository.git
      chart_name: grafana-operator
      namespace: grafana
      values:
        clusterMonitoringEnabled: true
        grafana:
          enabled: true

  - name: Create Grafana instance
    oc_rbac:
      api: v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: grafana
        namespace: grafana
      spec:
        replicas: 1
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: grafana
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: grafana
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: grafana
              image: grafana/grafana:latest
              ports:
              - containerPort: 3000

  - name: Configure datasource for Grafana instance
    oc_rbac:
      api: v1
      kind: ConfigMap
      metadata:
        name: grafana-datasource
        namespace: grafana
      data:
        datasources.yaml: |
          apiVersion: 1
          datasources:
          - name: thanos-querier
            type: prometheus
            url: https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc:9091
            isDefault: true

  - name: Update Grafana instance with new datasource configuration
    oc_rbac:
      api: v1
      kind: DeploymentConfig
      metadata:
        name: grafana
        namespace: grafana
      spec:
        template:
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: grafana
              command: ["bash", "-c"]
              args:
                - "grafana-cli --home=/etc/grafana/conf --config=/etc/grafana/conf/defaults.ini datasource update-thanos-querier"
```

This playbook will automate the entire process, from creating the necessary namespace and service account to installing the Grafana operator and configuring the datasource for the created Grafana instance.
